lockedMessage: [PT] Trip Memory is part of Explorer (Plus). Upgrade to create a shareable memory when you finish a trip.
createToggle: [PT] Create a memory of this trip
notFound: [PT] No memory saved for this trip.
upgradeShareJournal: [PT] Upgrade to Explorer to share your memory card and keep a journal.
entryPlaceholder: [PT] Write a moment from your trip…
communitySectionSubtitle: [PT] Publish this completed trip to the Community feed. Add a tip and tags so others can discover your route.
communityTipPlaceholder: [PT] What should the next traveler know?
communitySectionSubtitleUpdate: [PT] Edit your tip, tags, or travel style, then tap Update Community. Your feed listing will match this trip’s itinerary and cover photo.
communityUpdatedBody: [PT] Your route on the Community tab now reflects your changes.
communityTipRequired: [PT] Add a short tip before publishing.
communityPlacesRequired: [PT] Add at least one place to your itinerary before publishing.
communityPublishedBody: [PT] Your trip is now on the Community feed.
communityPublishError: [PT] Could not publish. Please try again.
communityPublishedBadgeBody: [PT] Travelers can discover this route in the Community tab.
